notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Leo Rivas to first baseman Josh Naylor. CJ Kayfus out at 2nd. Brayan Rocchio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo grounds into a double play, shortstop Leo Rivas to first baseman Josh Naylor. Chase DeLauter out at 2nd. Kyle Manzardo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Brayan Rocchio.
